transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Gary Olsen. I'm calling because my faucet is backing up. Dispatcher: Hi Gary, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Rheem, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 7 River Road. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out next Monday at 9. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Rheem faucet, an older one, 15 years
